string.value: This app requires background running permission to continue long-running reply tasks in the background.

string.value: This device may not support holding-hand sensing (error 801). The buttons stay in default positions.

string.value: Notify when a reply request fails

string.value: If alerts only appear in "Other notifications" or do not pop on lock screen/home, open system notification settings and enable banner and lock-screen display.

string.name: settings_support_development_desc
string.value: Voluntary support to keep ChatCube growing

string.name: usage_stats_empty_desc
string.value: Start chatting with AI and your usage will show up here

string.name: export_security_note
string.value: The export includes API keys, search service and MCP connection settings so it can be used immediately after import. Store it only in trusted locations.

string.name: reasoning_picker_hint
string.value: Balance response depth and latency. Higher effort gives richer reasoning at the cost of speed.

string.name: reasoning_level_off_hint
string.value: Disable reasoning. Fastest replies but may skip multi-step logic.

string.name: reasoning_level_auto_hint
string.value: Let the model decide how much thinking is needed.

string.name: reasoning_level_low_hint
string.value: Light reasoning. Good for quick lookups and short answers.

string.name: reasoning_level_medium_hint
string.value: Balanced reasoning for most use cases.

string.name: reasoning_level_high_hint
string.value: Deep reasoning. Recommended for code, math and complex analysis.

string.name: reasoning_level_xhigh_hint
string.value: Maximum reasoning budget. Slowest but most thorough.

string.name: search_engine_runtime_hint
string.value: After saving, chat web search uses the selected search service.

string.name: search_tavily_base_url_hint
string.value: Enter the Tavily service URL. Keep the default unless you use a proxy or custom service.

string.value:
Please polish the following text to make it more fluent and natural while keeping the original meaning:

[paste text here]

string.value:
Please translate the following between Chinese and English — Chinese to English, English to Chinese:

[paste text here]

string.name: preset_prompt_code_explain_body
string.value:
Please walk through the following code line by line, covering what it does, key logic, and potential issues:

```
[paste code here]
```

string.name: preset_prompt_learn_explain5_body
string.value:
Please explain this concept in plain language, with one real-life example:

[concept]

string.name: preset_prompt_creative_brainstorm_body
string.value:
Please give me 10 creative ideas around the following topic, with a brief highlight for each:

[topic]

string.name: preset_prompt_summary_long_body
string.value:
Please summarize the following long text into key points under 200 words, preserving the core conclusions:

[content]
